Line: 33, 38, 43, 50

Migration rule [sd-prop-value-pagesection-variant-light]:
The value "light" is no longer valid for the `variant` prop on <PageSection>.
Choose the appropriate replacement from the valid values: "default", "secondary"

Review the component documentation to determine which value best matches the behavior of "light".

Incident context:
  componentName: PageSection
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: light

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropValueChange
Component: PageSection
Prop: variant
From: light

Code context:
```

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/forklift-console-plugin/source/src/modules/StorageMaps/views/details/tabs/Details/StorageMapDetailsTab.tsx
2. Apply ONLY the change described by the migration rule at or near line 33, 38, 43, 50
3. Make the minimum edit necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your change (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Write the fixed file
6. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through the fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edit, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists the change you made, or note if the fix was already applied or could not be applied (with a brief reason).
I'll start by reading the file to understand the full context.

Now let me reason through the fix:

**Analysis:**
- The migration rule says `variant="light"` is no longer valid for `<PageSection>`.
- Valid replacements are `"default"` or `"secondary"`.
- In PatternFly v6, the `"light"` variant was replaced by `"default"` — the light background is the standard/default appearance for page sections.
- All four occurrences on lines 33, 38, 43, and 50 use `variant="light"`.
- The correct replacement is `variant="default"` since `"light"` maps to the default background style.

Let me apply the fix by replacing all four instances:

arguments.after:
<PageSection variant="default" className="forklift-page-section--details">
        <SectionHeading text={t('Storage map details')} />
        <DetailsSection obj={obj} />
      </PageSection>

      <PageSection variant="default" className="forklift-page-section">
        <SectionHeading text={t('Providers')} />
        <ProvidersSection obj={obj} />
      </PageSection>

      <PageSection variant="default" className="forklift-page-section">
        <Flex direction={{ default: 'column' }} spaceItems={{ default: 'spaceItemsLg' }}>
          <SectionHeading text={t('Map')} />
          <MapsSection storageMap={obj} />
        </Flex>
      </PageSection>

      <PageSection variant="default" className="forklift-page-section">
arguments.before:
<PageSection variant="light" className="forklift-page-section--details">
        <SectionHeading text={t('Storage map details')} />
        <DetailsSection obj={obj} />
      </PageSection>

      <PageSection variant="light" className="forklift-page-section">
        <SectionHeading text={t('Providers')} />
        <ProvidersSection obj={obj} />
      </PageSection>

      <PageSection variant="light" className="forklift-page-section">
        <Flex direction={{ default: 'column' }} spaceItems={{ default: 'spaceItemsLg' }}>
          <SectionHeading text={t('Map')} />
          <MapsSection storageMap={obj} />
        </Flex>
      </PageSection>

      <PageSection variant="light" className="forklift-page-section">

content.text:
All four instances have been updated correctly. No imports or other code needed to change — the edit is purely a prop value replacement.

## Changes Applied

- **Lines 33, 38, 43, 50**: Changed `variant="light"` → `variant="default"` on all four `<PageSection>` components. In PatternFly v6, the `"light"` variant was removed and its visual behavior corresponds to the `"default"` variant (standard light background for page sections). No other code changes were necessary — imports and surrounding logic remain correct.
